title: juncus haenkei
intro: Juncus haenkei, also known as Haenke's rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. This plant is commonly found in wetlands and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Juncus haenkei include its ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs, and soothe skin irritations. Juncus haenkei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
